LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF ROBERT COWAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION RAISES TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO THE EXISTENCE AND CONTRIBUTION OF ANY NUISANCE AND TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES TO PAY RENT. PLAINTIFF STIPULATED FOR THE FORM OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-09-2007 VACATED. (218)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-27-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. STEPHEN M. SOLTANZADEH OF THE STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 956-6488 X21 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
THERESA GRIFFITH, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - PLAINTIFF ROBERT COWAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Plaintiff's declaration raises triable issues of material fact as to the existence and contribution of any nuisance and to affirmative defenses to pay rent. PLAINTIFF STIPULATED FOR THE FORM OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =(301/PJB/LB)
